title: Karpov's Immortal
intro: In this game, watch for the control of key squares near the kings and how hanging pieces can shift the dynamics. Tactical opportunities arise frequently, especially with forks and captures that can change the balance of power.
summary: Throughout these moves, both players created and removed hanging pieces, leading to increased tactical complexity. The pressure around the kings evolved, with checks and forks being introduced that forced defensive responses. The control of key squares fluctuated as pieces were captured and repositioned.
